creator: satz@iranger.com
text:
I am using 6.1 on a Dell PowerEdge 750 machine with an Intel 6300ESB
SATA150 controller. 6.1 works fine. 6.3 fails to boot due to its not
initializing ata1 where my sata disk is located as ad2. ata0 is initialized
just fine which has the cdrom. Consequently 6.3 cannot find root nor boot.

How-To-Repeat: Try to boot 6.3 on a Dell Poweredge 750.
